subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-05-06 in
subcodes.first_line: When the Blessed Beauty was residing in Baghdad, there was a Shi'I Muslim by the name of Shaykh 'Abdu'l-Hamid
subcodes.first_line_orig: شيخ عبدالحميد در اياميکه جمال مبارک در بغداد تشريف داشتند محبت زيادى داشت شيعه بود ولى بى نهايت محبت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
